_comment: Maps git repo names to Linear project(s), team, and description. Used by resolve-project.sh (placement) and /spec (discovery).

aws-infrastructure.description: Terragrunt/Terraform IaC: ECS, ECR, RDS, S3, Route53, IAM for all workloads

crm.description: Rails CRM: deal flow tracking, pipeline management

claude.description: Claude Code plugin: shared skills, hooks, practices for Augment Risk engineering

helm.description: Helm: strategic initiative portfolio tool (React 19 + Vite + Tailwind CSS 4, Express 5)

tf-modules.description: Reusable Terraform modules (compute, data-stores, networking, etc.)

windmill.description: Windmill platform: ELT pipelines, apps (lakeviewer), helm, infra

nullbreaker.description: Cyberpunk turn-based tactical RPG (Phaser + React client, Colyseus server). Solo project.

parcha.description: Browser-hosted live-coding DAW with MCP-first architecture (Preact + CodeMirror + Strudel). Solo project.
